tasks.description: Create a service that maps a 'Consensus Matrix' to automated smart-contract or API calls for budget disbursement.
Build a module that takes the Consensus Matrix and runs 'What-If' scenarios against current treasury data to predict the impact of community decisions.
Implement ActivityPub federation endpoints with unit tests mocking WebFinger responses.
Create DeliberationPage.vue with QSlider inputs and Vitest component tests verifying calculation logic.
Implement request validation and rate limiting for all federation API endpoints.
Develop the service to process incoming interaction threads and output a weighted Consensus Matrix.
Auto-generate the architecture documentation based on project file analysis.
Create a full-lifecycle test suite that runs integration tests across the backend and frontend components.
Configure multi-stage Docker builds for the full stack and automate deployment to a local K3s cluster.
Build an ingress controller to handle cross-instance message routing and signature verification for ActivityPub.
Refactor the UI layout to integrate real-time telemetry streaming from the simulation engine.
Develop a supervisor agent to log system health, model latency, and resource usage to the SQLite database.
